source_file_name: Handoyo (2024) - Trust, Risk, Security in E-commerce Meta-analysis.pdf
notes: Initial golden fixture. Meta-analysis paper and the strongest first source for summary tables and citation-heavy layout.

source_file_name: Blut, M., et al. (2021) - Journal of the Academy of Marketing Science.pdf
notes: Long journal-format article selected as the baseline multi-column research paper.

source_file_name: Oprea & Bra (2025) - AI Game-Changer in E-Business.pdf
notes: Methods-heavy LaTeX-origin paper selected for formula and model-oriented extraction coverage.

source_file_name: Nguyen et al. (2023) - Chatbots Anthropomorphism Customer Experience.pdf
notes: Mainstream empirical paper selected for chatbot and customer-experience layouts.

source_file_name: Masciari et al. (2024) - AI Recommendation Systems and Ethics.pdf
notes: Selected as the likely complex-table and taxonomy-style fixture for the first baseline corpus.
